project_type: TypeScript monorepo with 17 Next.js 15 apps, 90+ shared packages, Turborepo orchestration
build_system: pnpm 10 workspaces + Turborepo 2. Root turbo.json defines tasks: lint, typecheck (depends on ^build), test (depends on ^build), build (depends on ^build, outputs dist/** .next/**)
test_framework: Vitest 2 for unit/integration tests, Playwright for E2E. Most app vitest configs include only backend/__tests__/**/*.test.ts. shared-ui uses jsdom environment. packages/common uses default (node). @testing-library/react + @testing-library/jest-dom available in shared-ui.
verification_instructions: 1) pnpm typecheck 2) pnpm lint 3) pnpm test. Full gate: pnpm ci:gates (typecheck + lint --max-warnings 0 + test + build)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. No Docker daemon needed for unit tests. Apps use @tanstack/react-query hooks pattern. Avoid: apps/quantai, apps/quantads, packages/quant-tools, packages/quant-economy, .github/workflows/
contribution_requirements: Zero-defect QA pass. No new features. Focus on tests, performance fixes, accessibility fixes, bug fixes only. Keep changes small and reviewable.
key_patterns: React hooks use @tanstack/react-query (useQuery/useMutation). Components use framer-motion + @quant/brand springs. Vitest with vi.fn()/vi.spyOn() for mocking. E2E uses @axe-core/playwright for a11y. Apps have services/ for backend logic tested in backend/__tests__/. Frontend hooks in src/hooks/ are currently UNTESTED. Components in src/components/ are UNTESTED in app directories (only shared-ui has component tests).
directory_structure: apps/ - 17 Next.js apps (each has src/ with app/, components/, hooks/, providers/ and backend/ with services). packages/ - 90+ shared libraries. e2e/ - Playwright E2E tests with tests/a11y/, tests/performance/, tests/chat/, etc. scripts/ - build tooling.
